title: Рудокоп: Новые глубины
description: Miner: New Depths" is a Minecraft mod that adds new pickaxes, adamantium ore, and a miner who offers unique goods. Dive into new depths and discover a multitude of possibilities!
body:
The "Miner: New Depths" mod adds new types of pickaxes to Minecraft, including iron and diamond pickaxes made entirely of blocks. These powerful tools allow you to efficiently mine resources at deeper levels of the world. Additionally, the mod introduces a new ore - adamantium, from which you can create both a regular pickaxe and a large block pickaxe, expanding your capabilities in the game.

The mod also features a new villager - the miner, who offers a variety of interesting items and resources necessary for your survival and exploration of the underground. The miner provides unique trades that will assist.
